'''竏喃-z-h-n''' ('''kafazhenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ladyfy|ladyfy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-z-h-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ladyfy|ladyfy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喃-z-h-n
|-
! Lemma
| kafazhenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== Subject agreement ===
''Object fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thifazhenoko || jifazhenoko || shifazhenoko || kifazhenoko
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthufazhenoko || jujufazhenoko || shushufazhenoko || kukufazhenoko
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thufazhenoko || jufazhenoko || shufazhenoko || kufazhenoko
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thufazhenoko || jufazhenoko || shufazhenoko || kufazhenoko
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thefazhenoko || jefazhenoko || shefazhenoko || kefazhenoko
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothofazhenoko || jojofazhenoko || shoshofazhenoko || kokofazhenoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thofazhenoko || jofazhenoko || shofazhenoko || kofazhenoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thofazhenoko || jofazhenoko || shofazhenoko || kofazhenoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || fazhenoko || fazhenoko || fazhenoko || fazhenoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || fazhenoko || fazhenoko || fazhenoko || fazhenoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || fazhenoko || fazhenoko || fazhenoko || fazhenoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || fazhenoko || fazhenoko || fazhenoko || fazhenoko
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thﾃｦfazhenoko || jﾃｦfazhenoko || shﾃｦfazhenoko || kﾃｦfazhenoko
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathafazhenoko || jajafazhenoko || shashafazhenoko || kakafazhenoko
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thafazhenoko || jafazhenoko || shafazhenoko || kafazhenoko
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thafazhenoko || jafazhenoko || shafazhenoko || kafazhenoko
|}
=== Object agreement ===
''Subject fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || shafazhenithi || shafazheniji || shafazhenishi || shafazheniki
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || shafazhenﾃｯf || shafazhenﾃｯf || shafazhenﾃｯf || shafazhenﾃｯf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || shafazhenﾃｦthﾃｦ || shafazhenﾃｦjﾃｦ || shafazhenﾃｦshﾃｦ || shafazhenﾃｦkﾃｦ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || shafazhenatha || shafazhenaja || shafazhenasha || shafazhenaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || shafazhenatha || shafazhenaja || shafazhenasha || shafazhenaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || shafazhenathaf || shafazhenajaf || shafazhenashaf || shafazhenakaf
|}
